heading: Natural gas for essential agricultural uses
label: 3391 Natural gas for essential agricultural uses

children.text: does not reduce the quantity of natural gas delivered for such use below the use requirement specified in subsection (c); or
is necessary in order to meet the requirements of high-priority users.

children.heading: Curtailment priority not applicable if alternative fuel available
children.label: b Curtailment priority not applicable if alternative fuel available
children.text: If the Commission, in consultation with the Secretary of Agriculture, determines, by rule or order, that use of a fuel (other than natural gas) is economically practicable and that the fuel is reasonably available as an alternative for any agricultural use of natural gas, the provisions of subsection (a) shall not apply with respect to any curtailment of deliveries for such use.

children.heading: Determination of essential agricultural use requirements
children.label: c Determination of essential agricultural use requirements
children.text: The Secretary of Agriculture shall certify to the Secretary of Energy and the Commission the natural gas requirements (expressed either as volumes or percentages of use) of persons (or classes thereof) for essential agricultural uses in order to meet the requirements of full food and fiber production.

children.heading: Authority of Secretary of Agriculture to intervene
children.label: d Authority of Secretary of Agriculture to intervene
children.text: The Secretary of Agriculture may intervene as a matter of right in any proceeding before the Commission which is conducted in connection with implementing the requirements of the rule prescribed under subsection (a).

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: e Limitation
children.text: The Secretary of Agriculture may not exercise any authority under this section for the purpose of restricting the production of any crop.

children.label: A
children.text: for agricultural production, natural fiber production, natural fiber processing, food processing, food quality maintenance, irrigation pumping, crop drying, or

children.label: B
children.text: as a process fuel or feedstock in the production of fertilizer, agricultural chemicals, animal feed, or food,

children.label: A
children.text: uses natural gas in a residence;

children.label: B
children.text: uses natural gas in a commercial establishment in amounts of less than 50 Mcf on a peak day;

children.label: C
children.text: uses natural gas in any school, hospital, or similar institution; or

children.label: D
children.text: uses natural gas in any other use the curtailment of which the Secretary of Energy determines would endanger life, health, or maintenance of physical property.
